heading: Technical Translation
content: I spent years explaining complex physics to teenagers; I can explain complex architecture as well as complex coding problems to stakeholders and peers.

heading: Game-Day Resilience
content: Coaching taught me how to stay calm and pivot strategies when things go wrong under pressure. This comes in especially handy when I strike a hard rock in coding!

heading: The 'Teaching' Mentality
content: I’m a developer who actively levels up the people around me through mentorship, concise explanations and clear documentation.
